d<.task: {d<} is the _ruby rune of the lower_, giving 1 where the value on its left ranks beneath the value on its right, and 0 otherwise. Two ranks of ice-crystals are set to judgement, the readings `a` against the rivals `b` вАФ mark where each `a` stands lower than the crystal it faces.

dвЙ§.task: {dвЙ§} is the _ruby rune of at-most_, giving 1 where what lies on its left does not exceed what lies on its right. Mark where each reading `a` stands no higher than its warden-mark `b`.

dвЙ•.task: {dвЙ•} is the _ruby rune of at-least_, giving 1 where what lies on its left is not surpassed by what lies on its right. Mark where each reading `a` reaches or clears the threshold `b`.

d>.task: {d>} is the _ruby rune of the higher_, giving 1 where the value on its left overtops the value on its right, and 0 otherwise. Mark where each reading `a` rises above the rival `b` it faces.

dвКГ.task: {dвКГ} is the _ruby rune of picking_, lifting from the hoard on its right the single item whose place is named on its left. A row of frost-sealed chests `w` lines the vault вАФ draw out the `n`th.

M\\.task: {M\} is the _sapphire rune of scanning_ вАФ set to the right of a rune, it sweeps that rune through the ever-growing prefixes of the list on its right, leaving a trail of running results. Drawing on {d+}, tally the running total of the tribute `t`, coin upon coin.

l0.task: Beyond the eastern arch lies the Hall of Mirrors, and its seal yields only to broad mastery. Take the names `a` and `b`, join them into one strand, and speak it mirrored end to end.
